summary: Tested 3 new dashboard features: User Stats, Business Dashboard Summary, Admin Custom Reports. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/users/my-stats requires auth - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/users/my-stats returns total_bookings, completed, upcoming, total_spent, reviews_given, avg_rating_given, favorite_service, member_since, recent_completed - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/dashboard-summary requires business auth - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/dashboard-summary returns today, week, month, new_reviews - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/admin/reports/custom requires admin auth - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/admin/reports/custom returns filters, summary, daily_chart, top_businesses, top_cities - PASSED
Backend: Admin reports summary contains total_bookings, completed, confirmed, cancelled, cancel_rate, revenue, unique_users, unique_businesses, new_users, new_businesses - PASSED
Backend: Admin reports accepts date_from and date_to filters - PASSED
Backend: Admin reports accepts city filter - PASSED
Backend: Admin reports accepts category filter - PASSED
Backend: Admin reports daily_chart has date, bookings, revenue structure - PASSED
Backend: Admin reports top_businesses has business_id, name, city, bookings structure - PASSED
Backend: Admin reports top_cities has city, bookings structure - PASSED
Frontend: UserDashboardPage shows stats cards (Total reservas: 0, Total gastado: $0.00, Citas pendientes: 0, Rating: -) - PASSED
Frontend: UserDashboardPage shows quick actions (Mis citas, Favoritos, Mis pagos, Buscar, Notificaciones) - PASSED
Frontend: UserDashboardPage rebook section not shown when user has no completed bookings (expected behavior) - PASSED
Frontend: BusinessDashboardPage shows summary cards (Hoy, Esta semana, Este mes, Resenas nuevas) - PASSED
Frontend: BusinessDashboardPage summary cards show bookings, revenue, unique clients data - PASSED
Frontend: AdminDashboardPage has 12 tabs (Resumen, Negocios, Usuarios, Resenas, Categorias, Rankings, Ciudades, Configuracion, Soporte, Reportes, Suscripciones, Finanzas) - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Reportes tab has date filters (Desde, Hasta) - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Reportes tab has city filter - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Reportes tab has category filter - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Reportes tab has 'Generar Reporte' button - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Reportes tab shows summary cards (Total Reservas, Completadas, Canceladas, Ingresos, Usuarios Unicos, Nuevos usuarios, Nuevos negocios, Negocios activos, Confirmadas) - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Reportes tab shows daily chart (Reservas e Ingresos por Dia) - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Reportes tab shows Top Negocios en Periodo list - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Reportes tab shows Top Ciudades en Periodo list - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new features are properly implemented and working
User stats endpoint correctly returns all expected fields including recent_completed for rebook suggestions
Business dashboard summary correctly calculates today, week, month metrics with revenue and booking counts
Admin custom reports supports all filters (date_from, date_to, city, category) and returns comprehensive data
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
API integration in api.js correctly implements usersAPI.getMyStats, businessesAPI.getDashboardSummary, adminAPI.getCustomReport

admin.note: Requires TOTP 2FA - use /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py to generate code

test_user.note: Email verified in DB for testing

seed_data_creation: Created test user (testuser_stats@test.com) and test business (testbiz_dashboard@test.com) for testing. Both have email_verified=true.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel now has 12 tabs. New features: 1) User stats on UserDashboardPage shows total_bookings, total_spent, upcoming, avg_rating_given. Rebook section shows recent_completed bookings. 2) Business dashboard-summary shows today/week/month metrics with revenue and booking counts. 3) Admin Reportes tab has date/city/category filters and shows summary cards, daily chart, top businesses and top cities. Admin login requires TOTP 2FA - use /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py.

mocked_apis_list: Cloudinary image uploads use emergent object storage fallback

rebook_section.note: Shows recent_completed bookings for quick rebooking

sections: Daily chart (Reservas e Ingresos por Dia)
